metadata.package: BHE BRTL32 SNMP Test Plan R2
metadata.purpose: Structured test plan for validating BHE BRTL32 SNMP readiness and ONE normalization after vendor/customer data is received.

tests.objective: Confirm supported SNMP version and preferred security mode.
tests.prerequisite: Vendor provides SNMP version support statement and access procedure.
tests.input: Vendor SNMP configuration guide and site security requirements.
tests.expectedResult: Supported SNMP version and read-only monitoring mode are documented without assuming SNMPv3 unless confirmed.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Vendor document reference, configuration screenshot if available, approved security mode.

tests.prerequisite: Device or converter endpoint IP address and SNMP credentials are available.
tests.input: SNMP polling request to configured endpoint on UDP 161 or confirmed alternate port.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Timestamped polling command, response sample, source/destination IPs.

tests.prerequisite: Trap support is confirmed and trap destination is configured.
tests.input: Configured trap receiver endpoint and vendor trap generation procedure.
tests.expectedResult: Trap receiver obtains BHE trap packets on UDP 162 or confirmed alternate port.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Trap receiver log, packet capture, trap source IP, trap OID.

tests.objective: Run snmpwalk against the BHE endpoint.
tests.prerequisite: MIB/OID scope and SNMP access are available.
tests.input: Read-only snmpwalk using confirmed SNMP version and credentials.
tests.expectedResult: Accessible OIDs are captured without write operations.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Sanitized snmpwalk output, command parameters excluding secrets, timestamp.

tests.prerequisite: Vendor provides identity OIDs for model, serial number, firmware, and device name.
tests.input: SNMP get requests for identity OIDs.
tests.expectedResult: Identity fields match expected BRTL32 device and site inventory.
tests.evidenceToCapture: OID responses, mapped ONE identity fields, asset correlation notes.

tests.prerequisite: Vendor provides RSSI OID, unit, scale, and normal/alarm thresholds.
tests.input: SNMP get request for input RSSI.
tests.expectedResult: RSSI value is decoded into expected unit and range.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Raw OID response, decoded value, unit, threshold comparison.

tests.prerequisite: Vendor provides output power OID, unit, scale, and normal/alarm thresholds.
tests.input: SNMP get request for output power.
tests.expectedResult: Output power value is decoded into expected unit and range.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Raw OID response, decoded value, unit, threshold comparison.

tests.prerequisite: Vendor provides safe test alarm procedure.
tests.input: Approved test alarm action performed under site control.
tests.expectedResult: BHE endpoint exposes active alarm by polling, trap, or both.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Test procedure record, active alarm OID/trap sample, operator observation.

tests.prerequisite: Trap support and active alarm test are confirmed.
tests.input: Active alarm generated while trap receiver is running.
tests.expectedResult: Active trap is received with sufficient payload to identify alarm and severity.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Trap packet sample, varbind list, source IP, decoded alarm label.

tests.input: Clear the test alarm while trap receiver is running.
tests.expectedResult: Clear trap is received or clear state is confirmed through polling if traps are not supported.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Clear trap packet or polling clear sample, timestamp, active-to-clear correlation.

tests.input: Active alarm sample and vendor severity field or table.
tests.expectedResult: ONE severity is mapped from vendor severity or agreed mapping table.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Vendor severity value, ONE severity, mapping rule reference.

tests.prerequisite: Vendor confirms acknowledgement support and command behavior.
tests.input: Approved acknowledgement test using vendor procedure.
tests.expectedResult: Acknowledgement state changes as documented, or read-only monitoring proceeds without acknowledgement.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Acknowledgement OID or vendor tool screenshot, before/after state, access mode.

tests.prerequisite: Site-approved test window and endpoint details are available.
tests.input: Controlled endpoint disconnect or firewall block under site supervision.
tests.expectedResult: ONE detects communication loss and records evidence without confusing it with a BHE equipment alarm.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Polling timeout evidence, event timestamp, restore timestamp, ONE normalized event sample.

tests.prerequisite: RS232-to-TCP/IP converter model and protocol exposure are confirmed.
tests.input: Polling/trap or TCP socket test through converter according to vendor guidance.
tests.expectedResult: Converter behavior and exposed protocol are documented for EDGE integration.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Converter model, configuration screenshot, protocol test result, endpoint details.

tests.prerequisite: At least one active or clear alarm sample is available.
tests.input: Raw BHE SNMP polling response or trap sample.
tests.expectedResult: LINK normalization produces source system, protocol, raw OID, raw value, alarm state, asset mapping, severity, and evidence fields.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Raw SNMP sample, normalized JSON event, decoder version, mapping reference.

tests.prerequisite: ONE normalized event envelope is available.
tests.input: Normalized BHE event routed to Evidence / Reports.
tests.expectedResult: Evidence export includes raw OID/trap, raw value, source endpoint, decoder version, mapping reference, and asset/location linkage.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Evidence export sample and report output sample.
